author: gb9t
content: Iter 78 result: drivers/md/dm-mirror.md (legacy mirror target - dm-raid1.c ~1531 + dm-log.c ~916 + dm-region-hash.c; per-target MirrorSet + per-region dirty-state via dm-log + per-region in-flight tracking via dm-region-hash + read_balance + persistent vs core vs cluster log types + recovery via dm_kcopyd; LVM2-pre-2010 backend) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-vmenter.md (VMX vmenter asm stub - vmenter.S ~387 lines; __vmx_vcpu_run ABI RDI=vcpu/RSI=regs/RDX=run_flags + host GPR push/pop + guest GPR load from regs[] + CR2 round-trip + VMRESUME vs VMLAUNCH selection + Spectre-v2 retpoline + IBRS save/restore boundary + L1TF L1D flush + noinstr annotation). 106 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-flakey.md (fault-injection target) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-vmenter.md (AMD SVM vmenter asm stub).
